name: Transilvania
summary: Large central ethnographic space with diverse village styles, dances, and ceremonial clothing.

games.name: Fecioreasca
games.description: Men's virtuoso dance with rhythmic stamps and turning sequences.

costumes.name: Suman si pieptar
costumes.description: Wool coat and sheepskin vest combinations specific to mountain and plateau communities.

traditions.name: Nedeie
traditions.description: Seasonal fair and communal gathering tied to pastoral and religious calendars.
